nasb.text: She brought it before Saul and his servants, and they ate. Then they arose and went away that night.

esv.text: and she put it before Saul and his servants, and they ate. Then they rose and went away that night.

cnv.text: 送到掃羅和他臣僕的面前；他們吃了以後，當夜就起身離去了。

ccb.text: 摆在扫罗和他的随从面前，他们吃完后，当天晚上就离开了。
